title: gwq shell integration configuration
content:
To enable gwq shell integration (directory change in current shell for 'gwq cd'), the following steps are required:
1. Update gwq config (dot_config/gwq/config.toml) to include [cd] launch_shell = false.
2. Ensure the shell's completion script for gwq is sourced, as it contains the necessary 'cd' wrapper. In this repo, this was done in dot_config/zsh/lazy/mise.zsh by adding 'source "$completion_file"' after generating the completion script.
